title: liparis angustifolia
intro: Liparis angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved liparis or narrow-leaved orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Liparis angustifolia include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into tea, or used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health issues.
